cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Good morning, this is Rohan from the District Education Office. May I speak with Simran Kaur, please?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, this is Simran Kaur. How can I help you, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Good morning, Ms. Kaur. I am calling to collect some data for our annual report on student enrollment. Can you please provide me with the total number of students enrolled in your school?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, let me check that for you. We have around 500 students enrolled this year.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thank you, Ms. Kaur. Can you also tell me the number of students enrolled in each class, from 1st to 12th standard?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, sir. Let me just check our records. We have 50 students in 1st standard, 55 in 2nd, and so on. I can email you the detailed breakdown if you'd like.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: That would be great, thank you. Please email it to our official email address. I will make sure to include it in our report.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, can I ask what this data will be used for?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Of course, Ms. Kaur. This data will be used for our annual report to track student enrollment trends and allocate resources accordingly.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, that makes sense. I will send you the detailed breakdown by email today.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 144s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A representative from the District Education Office calls a school principal to collect data on student enrollment for an annual report.
